Subject: Re: Delivery Estimate Update  

Dear [Company Name],  

Thank you for your message.  

Regarding the delivery estimate of June 27, we understand that the transit period is relatively long. This may be due to the extended holiday period from June 22 to June 25 in the region. We will follow up at the earliest opportunity and seek your support as needed.  

Best regards,
